datasets.title: Sea Surface Temperature
datasets.abstractTxt: Daily global sea-surface temperature anomalies, blended from satellite and in-situ observations. Warm and cool departures from the 1991–2020 climatology reveal El Niño and marine heatwave signatures.

datasets.title: Global Precipitation Rate
datasets.abstractTxt: Half-hourly precipitation estimates from the multi-satellite IMERG product, showing storms, monsoons, and atmospheric rivers moving across the planet in near real time.

datasets.title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent
datasets.abstractTxt: Daily sea-ice concentration in the Arctic basin from passive-microwave sensors, tracing the seasonal advance and retreat of the ice edge and the long-term decline in summer minimums.

datasets.title: Earth at Night
datasets.abstractTxt: The global distribution of artificial light at night from the VIIRS Day/Night Band, a proxy for human settlement, energy use, and economic activity.

datasets.title: Coral Reefs of the World — Guided Tour
datasets.abstractTxt: A narrated tour visiting the planet's major coral-reef systems, layering sea-surface temperature and bleaching-alert data to explain where reefs are under stress.
